reason: Catalog reveals rich building blocks: momentum primitives (cf_momentum_divergence_6_24, rsi_1), volatility primitives (cf_vol_regime_transition, cf_vol_squeeze_breakout, cf_vol_term_spread, atr_1), and range compression features at 1h/5m (cf_range_compression_1h, cf_range_compression_5m). Before constructing cross-timeframe divergence features, need to confirm the exact custom feature authoring contract.
expected_evidence: Custom feature code structure and requirements

facts.volatility_primitives: cf_vol_regime_transition, cf_vol_squeeze_breakout, cf_vol_term_spread (1h), atr_1, cf_vol_regime_vov, cf_vol_imbalance_12
